name: Focus Fade
description: Washes out the window itself while it is unfocused, so the focused window stands out at a glance. Unfocused windows lose saturation, darken slightly and can take an optional tint; the focused window passes through untouched. Desaturation, dimming, tint strength and the tint colour are this pack's own parameters.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Desaturation
parameters.description: How much colour unfocused windows lose, where 1.0 is full grayscale

parameters.name: Tint strength
parameters.description: How strongly the tint colour washes over unfocused windows, where 0 keeps the plain fade

parameters.name: Tint colour
parameters.description: Colour of the optional unfocused wash, sepia by default
